Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}*huff* *huff* Sorry I kept you waiting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}That was great. I always say food tastes better with a buddy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I used to come here all the time with my teammates, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}They wouldn't come now even if I invited them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I don't really get along with people who don't take the sport seriously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}We even started training at different times. Nothing's organized anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 18 5 115}You're the only one who says that anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Anyway, they wouldn't come now even if I invited them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I don't really get along with people who don't take the sport seriously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}We even started training at different times. Nothing's organized anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I used to love it there, you know? I spent all my time on the track, practicing and training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}We all loved track and had so much fun together, but then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Ah, never mind. It doesn't matter. We're too different, them and me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'm going to reach heights they never will. I have to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase's really passionate about his sport.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're getting closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Sorry, that... That was a weird conversation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I think I'll do lunges the whole way home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
